name: helixgen
description: Generate Line 6 Helix Stadium .hsp presets from JSON or natural-language tone descriptions, and control a Stadium directly over the LAN — no editor app. List/read/create/rename/delete/save presets, back up a whole setlist to local files and restore/clone them (works offline), watch the device's live streams, and install a helixgen-authored .hsp straight onto a device slot as a playable preset. Bundles the /tone skill (drives prompts like '/tone Foo Fighters White Limo lead') and the helixgen MCP server (list-blocks, show-block, list-irs, generate, and device_* network tools). The helixgen + mcp_server code is bundled with the plugin and loaded from ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}; the MCP server launches via `uv`, which auto-provisions the `mcp`, `click`, `pyzmq`, and `msgpack` Python packages into an isolated env — requires `uv` on your PATH.
